properties.name: Loughgall Country Park
properties.description: A beautiful rural estate with a large lake, forest walks, and a quiet, safe play area perfect for a family stroll.

properties.name: Maghery Country Park
properties.description: Situated on the shores of Lough Neagh, offering woodland walks and a pleasant playground in a tranquil setting.

properties.name: Gosford Forest Park
properties.description: Home to the incredible 'All Out Play' adventure playground with giant wooden castles and zip lines. A must-visit!

properties.name: Peatlands Park
properties.description: Unique bogland park with a narrow-gauge railway and miles of easy-access walking trails through the woods.

properties.name: Scarva Park
properties.description: A lovely park beside the Newry Canal towpath. Famous for its local tea rooms and award-winning floral displays.

properties.name: Edenvilla Park
properties.description: Hidden gem in Portadown featuring the Secret Garden, a bird sanctuary, and a well-maintained playground.

properties.name: Oxford Island Nature Reserve
properties.description: Beautiful nature reserve on Lough Neagh with bird-watching hides, woodland walks, and a lakeside cafe.

properties.name: Slieve Gullion Forest Park
properties.description: Magical for kids! Features the 'Giant's Lair' adventure trail and a massive adventure play park.

properties.name: Lurgan Park
properties.description: Ireland's second-largest municipal park. Offers a massive lake, miles of paths, and a great inclusive playground.

properties.name: Tannaghmore Gardens & Animal Farm
properties.description: A family favorite with rare-breed farm animals, beautiful gardens, and one of the largest playgrounds in the area.
